月營收近一年次高.sqlSyntax: select basic_information.id, basic_information.產業類別, new_revenue.最新營收 from (select stock_id, 當月營收 as 最新營收 from month_revenue where update_date='{date}') as new_revenue inner join basic_information on new_revenue.stock_id = basic_information.id and basic_information.exchange_type in ('sii', 'otc') and basic_information.產業類別 not in ('生技醫療業', '建材營造', '文化創意業', '金融保險業', '金融業', '期貨商', '存託憑證', '證券') inner join daily_information on new_revenue.stock_id = daily_information.stock_id and daily_information.本日收盤價 > 10 left join (select stock_id, 當月營收 as 近一年次高 from (select stock_id, 當月營收, ROW_NUMBER() over (partition by stock_id order by 當月營收 desc) as ranking from month_revenue where update_date >= DATE_SUB('{date}', INTERVAL 13 MONTH)) as ranked_revenue where ranking=2) as ranked_revenue on new_revenue.stock_id = ranked_revenue.stock_id left join (select * from (select stock_id, 基本每股盈餘, 營業利益率, 稅前淨利率, ROW_NUMBER() over (partition by income_sheet.stock_id order by year desc, season desc) as row_num from income_sheet where income_sheet.stock_id in (select stock_id from month_revenue where update_date='{date}')) as incomesheet where row_num = 1) as newest_incomesheet on newest_incomesheet.stock_id = new_revenue.stock_id where new_revenue.最新營收 >= ranked_revenue.近一年次高 and newest_incomesheet.基本每股盈餘 > 0.25 and newest_incomesheet.營業利益率 > 0 and (newest_incomesheet.營業利益率/newest_incomesheet.稅前淨利率) > 0.66;
月營收近一年次高.title: {date} {year}年{month}月 {option} 第{page}頁

財報偏多選股.sqlSyntax: select inc.stock_id, inc.稀釋每股盈餘, inc.去年同期稀釋每股盈餘, case when inc.去年同期稀釋每股盈餘>0 then ROUND((inc.稀釋每股盈餘/inc.去年同期稀釋每股盈餘)*100-100, 2) else '負轉正' end as 成長率 from (select i.stock_id, i.稀釋每股盈餘, lyi.去年同期稀釋每股盈餘 from (select stock_id, 稀釋每股盈餘 from income_sheet where update_date='{date}' and 營業利益率 > 0 and 稀釋每股盈餘 > 0.25 and (營業利益率/稅前淨利率) > 0.67) as i left join (select stock_id, 稀釋每股盈餘 as 去年同期稀釋每股盈餘 from income_sheet where year={year}-1 and season={season}) as lyi on i.stock_id = lyi.stock_id) as inc left join basic_information as b on inc.stock_id = b.id left join daily_information as d on inc.stock_id = d.stock_id where (inc.稀釋每股盈餘/inc.去年同期稀釋每股盈餘)*100-100>d.本益比 and b.exchange_type in ('sii', 'otc') and b.產業類別 not in ('生技醫療業', '建材營造', '文化創意業', '金融保險業', '金融業', '期貨商', '存託憑證', '證券') and d.本日收盤價 > 10;
財報偏多選股.title: {date} {year}年Q{season} {option} 第{page}頁
